sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports left leg pain and difficulty walking, describing it as sore. He also reports a history of atopic eczema and current use of fluocinonide for eczema. He has previously taken ibuprofen and tylenol for pain.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Physical exam reveals significant tenderness to the lateral aspect of the right upper leg. The x-ray shows no fracture or swelling.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient likely has a contusion of the right upper leg.
medical_concepts: contusion of the right upper leg

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: I am starting an anti-inflammatory medication.

medical_concepts: contusion of the right upper leg
